---
title: "Visualization and Analytical Communication Review"
subtitle: "Chart Fit, Encoding Quality, Uncertainty, and Accessibility"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Analytical question

State the question the visualization answers.

## Chart choice

Explain why the chart type fits the task: comparison, trend, distribution, relationship, uncertainty, or exact lookup.

## Reproducible example

```{python}
visuals = 6
approved = 2
in_review = 3
needs_revision = 1
print({
    "visuals": visuals,
    "approved_share": approved / visuals,
    "needs_revision_share": needs_revision / visuals
})
```

## Interpretation

Describe the main comparison and the visual evidence supporting it.

## Uncertainty

Place limitations and uncertainty near the claim they qualify.

## Accessibility

Document color, contrast, labels, alt text, and color-independent encodings.

## Appendix

Preserve source assets, methods, evidence links, and review notes.
